cmd: cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && git branch -a | head -20
cd "C:\Dev\echo-member-profiles" 2>/dev/null && git log --oneline -12 || echo "Worktree not available"
cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && git status frontend/src/config/candidatures.ts

cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && git add frontend/src/config/candidatures.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: track candidatures config file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git merge feat/member-profiles --no-edit 2>&1
cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && git stash list
cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && ls .claude/hooks* 2>/dev/null; ls .claude/settings* 2>/dev/null; cat .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No settings file"
cd "C:\Dev\Site web ECHO" && git stash show stash@{0} --stat
